proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_041` values are associated with longer mean `pfs_months` across the cohort.

analyses.method: Univariable linear regression of `pfs_months` on continuous `feature_041`.
analyses.result_summary: Each 1-unit increase in `feature_041` was associated with +0.1765 months of `pfs_months` (z=266.5).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_041` at or above the median value 65 have longer mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_041` below 65.

analyses.method: Welch mean comparison using a median split at `feature_041 >= 65`.
analyses.result_summary: Mean `pfs_months` was 5.7323 for `feature_041 >= 65` versus 2.8856 below 65, a +2.8468 month difference.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ordinal `feature_025` values are associated with shorter mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.method: Univariable linear regression of `pfs_months` on ordinal `feature_025`.
analyses.result_summary: Each 1-level increase in `feature_025` was associated with -1.1897 months of `pfs_months`; level means were 5.2713, 4.0536, and 2.9078 months for levels 0, 1, and 2.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_036 = 1` have shorter mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_036 = 0`.

analyses.result_summary: Mean `pfs_months` was 3.7027 for `feature_036 = 1` versus 5.0547 for `feature_036 = 0`, a -1.3520 month difference.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_043 = 1` have longer mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_043 = 0`.

analyses.result_summary: Mean `pfs_months` was 5.0889 for `feature_043 = 1` versus 4.1168 for `feature_043 = 0`, a +0.9722 month difference.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with high `feature_050` values (`feature_050 >= 4.1`) have longer mean `pfs_months` than patients below that threshold.
Patients with high `feature_056` values (`feature_056 >= 6.4`) have shorter mean `pfs_months` than patients below that threshold.

analyses.method: Welch mean comparison using the empirical 75th percentile of `feature_050`.
analyses.result_summary: Mean `pfs_months` was 4.5626 for `feature_050 >= 4.1` versus 4.1988 below, a +0.3638 month difference.

analyses.method: Welch mean comparison using the empirical 75th percentile of `feature_056`.
analyses.result_summary: Mean `pfs_months` was 3.9293 for `feature_056 >= 6.4` versus 4.4401 below, a -0.5109 month difference.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_001 = 1` have shorter mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_001 = 0`.
Patients with `feature_015 = 1` have shorter mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_015 = 0`.

analyses.result_summary: Mean `pfs_months` was 4.1214 for `feature_001 = 1` versus 4.4482 for `feature_001 = 0`, a -0.3268 month difference.
Mean `pfs_months` was 4.1142 for `feature_015 = 1` versus 4.4194 for `feature_015 = 0`, a -0.3052 month difference.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_066 = 1` have shorter mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_066 = 0`.
Patients with `feature_042 = 1` have longer mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_042 = 0`.
Higher continuous `feature_029` values are associated with shorter mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Mean `pfs_months` was 4.0941 for `feature_066 = 1` versus 4.3220 for `feature_066 = 0`, a -0.2279 month difference.
Mean `pfs_months` was 4.5261 for `feature_042 = 1` versus 4.3050 for `feature_042 = 0`, a +0.2211 month difference.

analyses.method: Univariable linear regression of `pfs_months` on continuous `feature_029`.
analyses.result_summary: Each 1-unit increase in `feature_029` was associated with -0.00535 months of `pfs_months`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After additive adjustment for all measured `feature_*` columns, one standard deviation higher `feature_041` remains associated with longer `pfs_months`.
After additive adjustment for all measured `feature_*` columns, one standard deviation higher `feature_025` remains associated with shorter `pfs_months`.
After additive adjustment for all measured `feature_*` columns, `feature_036 = 1` remains associated with shorter `pfs_months`.
After additive adjustment for all measured `feature_*` columns, `feature_043 = 1` remains associated with longer `pfs_months`.

analyses.method: All-feature additive OLS with non-binary predictors standardized.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `feature_041` was +1.7501 months per SD.

analyses.method: All-feature additive OLS with non-binary predictors standardized.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `feature_025` was -0.7939 months per SD.

analyses.method: All-feature additive OLS with non-binary predictors standardized.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `feature_036 = 1` was -1.3615 months.

analyses.method: All-feature additive OLS with non-binary predictors standardized.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `feature_043 = 1` was +0.9430 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After additive adjustment for all measured `feature_*` columns, one standard deviation higher `feature_050` remains associated with longer `pfs_months`.
After additive adjustment for all measured `feature_*` columns, one standard deviation higher `feature_056` remains associated with shorter `pfs_months`.

analyses.method: All-feature additive OLS with non-binary predictors standardized.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `feature_050` was +0.2354 months per SD.

analyses.method: All-feature additive OLS with non-binary predictors standardized.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `feature_056` was -0.2935 months per SD.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for dominant main effects and `feature_043` interaction terms, `feature_066 = 1` is independently associated with shorter `pfs_months`.
After adjustment for dominant main effects and `feature_043` interaction terms, `feature_029 >= 10.07` is independently associated with shorter `pfs_months`.
After adjustment for dominant main effects and `feature_043` interaction terms, `feature_042 = 1` is independently associated with longer `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted main-effect coefficient for `feature_066 = 1` was +0.0018 months, not a decrease.
Adjusted main-effect coefficient for `feature_029 >= 10.07` was +0.0026 months, not a decrease.
Adjusted main-effect coefficient for `feature_042 = 1` was +0.0042 months and was not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_043 = 1` and `pfs_months` is smaller among patients with `feature_001 = 1` than among patients with `feature_001 = 0`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_043` effect was +1.6557 months when `feature_001 = 0` versus +0.0269 months when `feature_001 = 1`; interaction DID was -1.6288 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_043 = 1` and `pfs_months` is smaller among patients with `feature_015 = 1` than among patients with `feature_015 = 0`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_043` effect was +1.4796 months when `feature_015 = 0` versus +0.0255 months when `feature_015 = 1`; interaction DID was -1.4541 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_043 = 1` and `pfs_months` is smaller or reversed among patients with `feature_066 = 1` than among patients with `feature_066 = 0`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_043` effect was +1.0274 months when `feature_066 = 0` versus -0.1556 months when `feature_066 = 1`; interaction DID was -1.1829 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_043 = 1` and `pfs_months` is smaller among patients with high `feature_029` (`feature_029 >= 10.07`) than among patients with lower `feature_029`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_043` effect was +1.2913 months when `feature_029 < 10.07` versus -0.0006 months when `feature_029 >= 10.07`; interaction DID was -1.2918 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_043 = 1` and `pfs_months` is larger among patients with `feature_042 = 1` than among patients with `feature_042 = 0`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_043` effect was +0.9413 months when `feature_042 = 0` versus +1.9293 months when `feature_042 = 1`; unadjusted interaction DID was +0.9880 months.

analyses.method: Selected multivariable OLS including dominant `feature_043` resistance interactions.
analyses.result_summary: After adjustment for dominant resistance interactions, the `feature_043 x feature_042` coefficient was only +0.0801 months and was not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A composite resistance subgroup defined by `feature_001 = 1` or `feature_015 = 1` or `feature_066 = 1` or `feature_029 >= 10.07` has a smaller `feature_043 = 1` association with `pfs_months` than patients without any of those features.

analyses.method: Two-by-two difference-in-differences for `feature_043` by composite resistance status.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_043` effect was +3.6126 months without composite resistance versus +0.0250 months with composite resistance; interaction DID was -3.5875 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_043 = 1` and no composite resistance (`feature_001 = 0`, `feature_015 = 0`, `feature_066 = 0`, and `feature_029 < 10.07`) have longer mean `pfs_months` than all other patients.

analyses.method: Mean comparison for the joint subgroup `feature_043 = 1` and no composite resistance versus all other records.
analyses.result_summary: The joint subgroup had mean `pfs_months` of 7.7144 versus 4.1215 among all other patients, a +3.5929 month difference.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_043 = 1` and composite resistance (`feature_001 = 1` or `feature_015 = 1` or `feature_066 = 1` or `feature_029 >= 10.07`) have shorter mean `pfs_months` than all other patients.

analyses.method: Mean comparison for the joint subgroup `feature_043 = 1` and composite resistance versus all other records.
analyses.result_summary: The joint subgroup had mean `pfs_months` of 4.1471 versus 4.3401 among all other patients, a -0.1930 month difference.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The combined negative association of `feature_001 = 1` and `feature_015 = 1` with `pfs_months` is less severe than the sum of their individual negative associations.

analyses.result_summary: The unadjusted interaction DID was +0.4517 months, indicating subadditive negative effects.

analyses.method: Selected multivariable OLS including dominant main effects and `feature_043` interactions.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_001 x feature_015` coefficient was +0.5013 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for dominant main effects and other `feature_043` modifiers, `feature_001 = 1` still reduces the `feature_043 = 1` association with `pfs_months`.
After adjustment for dominant main effects and other `feature_043` modifiers, `feature_015 = 1` still reduces the `feature_043 = 1` association with `pfs_months`.
After adjustment for dominant main effects and other `feature_043` modifiers, `feature_066 = 1` still reduces the `feature_043 = 1` association with `pfs_months`.
After adjustment for dominant main effects and other `feature_043` modifiers, high `feature_029` (`feature_029 >= 10.07`) still reduces the `feature_043 = 1` association with `pfs_months`.

analyses.method: Selected multivariable OLS with interaction terms.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted `feature_043 x feature_001` coefficient was -1.7585 months.

analyses.method: Selected multivariable OLS with interaction terms.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted `feature_043 x feature_015` coefficient was -1.4541 months.

analyses.method: Selected multivariable OLS with interaction terms.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted `feature_043 x feature_066` coefficient was -1.7281 months.

analyses.method: Selected multivariable OLS with interaction terms.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted `feature_043 x feature_029_high_q75` coefficient was -1.1978 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_043 = 1` and `pfs_months` is larger among patients with `feature_025 >= 1` than among patients with `feature_025 = 0`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_043` effect was +0.9245 months when `feature_025 = 0` versus +0.9739 months when `feature_025 >= 1`; DID was +0.0493 months and not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_043 = 1` and `pfs_months` is larger among patients with high `feature_041` (`feature_041 >= 65`) than among patients with lower `feature_041`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_043` effect was +0.9608 months below `feature_041 = 65` versus +0.9746 months at or above 65; DID was +0.0138 months and not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association between `feature_036 = 1` and `pfs_months` is less severe among patients with `feature_025 >= 1` than among patients with `feature_025 = 0`.
The positive association between high `feature_041` (`feature_041 >= 65`) and `pfs_months` is smaller among patients with `feature_036 = 1` than among patients with `feature_036 = 0`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_036` effect was -1.4013 months when `feature_025 = 0` versus -1.3318 months when `feature_025 >= 1`; DID was +0.0695 months and did not reach p<0.05.
High `feature_041` effect was +2.8776 months when `feature_036 = 0` versus +2.8232 months when `feature_036 = 1`; DID was -0.0544 months and did not reach p<0.05.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_037 = 1` have shorter mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_037 = 0`.
Patients with `feature_018 = 1` have longer mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_018 = 0`.
Patients with `feature_061 = 1` have longer mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_061 = 0`.

analyses.result_summary: Mean difference for `feature_037 = 1` versus 0 was -0.0060 months and was not significant.
Mean difference for `feature_018 = 1` versus 0 was +0.0052 months and was not significant.
Mean difference for `feature_061 = 1` versus 0 was +0.0008 months and was not significant.
